title: selaginella palmiformis
intro: Selaginella palmiformis, also known as Spiny Club Moss, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella palmiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory problems, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions.
